arts.sum: The new Championship season is here! LiveScore’s round-up features fixture previews and expert predictions for all 12 games, starting with Birmingham vs. Ipswich.

arts.ttl: Bazunu starts: Southampton team news and predicted XI to face Wrexham
arts.sum: The latest Southampton team news as Will Still's side gear up to face Wrexham in the Championship on Saturday. The post Bazunu starts: Southampton team news and predicted XI to face Wrexham appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Ryan Reynolds' Wrexham face £150m challenge as Championship kicks off against Southampton
arts.sum: Wrexham face a daunting challenge as they kick off their Championship campaign against Southampton on Saturday, with a £150million deficit between the two clubs
